name: openclaw-claude-bridge
description: OpenAI-compatible proxy bridging OpenClaw to Claude Code CLI

scripts.test: node scripts/test-tool-parser.js && node scripts/test-bridge-tool-allowlist.js && node scripts/test-system-prompt-size.js && node scripts/test-routing.js && node scripts/test-no-tool-chat-routing.js && node scripts/test-env-loader.js && node scripts/test-install-mac-env-parser.js && node scripts/test-security.js && node scripts/test-attachment-allowlist.js && node scripts/test-attachment-size-budget.js && node scripts/test-attachment-async-download.js && node scripts/test-attachment-ssrf.js && node scripts/test-responsemap-key.js && node scripts/test-openai-response-safe-write.js && node scripts/test-state-store-versioning.js && node scripts/test-prompt-cache-tool-resume.js && node scripts/test-channel-serialization.js && node scripts/test-claude-flags.js && node scripts/test-claude-live-lifecycle.js && node scripts/test-dashboard-proxy-config.js
scripts.postinstall: cd dashboard && npm install --ignore-scripts && npm run build
